name: Space Brain Games
description: An immersive educational gaming suite designed to challenge and sharpen young minds through cosmic missions and brain-teasing puzzles. Launching soon.

description: Next-gen call management and spam protection. Shield your smartphone from unwanted calls and block spam numbers globally.

name: Smart Calculator – GST EMI
description: An all-in-one multipurpose calculator featuring GST, EMI, and financial calculations designed with absolute precision and ease of use.
